name: Landbase
description: Agentic AI go-to-market platform with GTM-1 Omni model that autonomously targets, qualifies and enriches accounts.

seo.title: Landbase — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Landbase: Agentic AI go-to-market platform with GTM-1 Omni model that autonomously targets, qualifies and enriches accounts.

when_to_use: AI GTM platform autonomously targeting and qualifying accounts
Intent-driven outreach using GTM-1 Omni model signals
Account enrichment and prioritization without manual research
Autonomous pipeline generation blending AI and data signals
GTM motion automation across targeting, enrichment, and outreach

pros: GTM-1 Omni model trained on outbound data
Fully autonomous account targeting and qualification
Reduces rep time on list building and research
cons: Newer entrant, less proven than Clay or Apollo
Agentic outputs still need human review
Integration depth limited vs mature players
review.verdict: Promising agentic GTM bet; watch the reply rates before betting pipeline on it.
review.best_for: Outbound-heavy teams willing to pilot agentic AI
review.not_for: Risk-averse orgs needing established vendor track record

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
